needs_client_action.title: Provide EverWebinar login
needs_client_action.reason: B3X needs access to set up the evergreen webinar funnel effectively.

needs_client_action.title: Decide on ad budget increase
needs_client_action.reason: B3X needs to know the approved budget to scale successful ad campaigns.

needs_client_action.title: Incorporate new webinar replay (updated version) into EverWebinar
needs_client_action.reason: B3X needs the updated webinar replay video to ensure the funnel content is current.

client_overdue.title: Decide on ad budget increase
client_overdue.action_needed: Provide a decision on whether to increase the ad budget.

strategic_direction.title: Review and Optimize High-Performing Ads
strategic_direction.reasoning: Based on the roadmap item to 'Look at the ads that are performing, and let's put The most emphasis on those. and cut out any fat that isn't working', focusing on the highest performing ads is a quick win to improve ROI.

strategic_direction.title: Evergreen Webinar Funnel Optimization
strategic_direction.reasoning: Given the transition to an evergreen model (as discussed in the 2026-03-24 meeting summary) and pending tasks related to EverWebinar setup (client action required), optimizing the funnel flow is crucial for lead generation.

strategic_direction.title: Website Audit and Optimization Proposal
strategic_direction.reasoning: Website is a significant service gap. A website audit is a valuable first step towards identifying conversion issues and developing a strategy for improvement that will support all other channels.

suggested_agenda.notes: Discuss progress on identifying top-performing ads and cutting underperforming ones. Review associated metrics.
Address client action items: EverWebinar login and updated webinar replay. Discuss follow-up flow setup.
Present the value proposition and scope of a website audit, highlighting its impact on overall marketing performance.
Summarize action items for both B3X and the client. Confirm deadlines.
